name: ChatFullInfo
description: This object contains full information about a chat.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this chat. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the chat, can be either “private”, “group”, “supergroup” or “channel”

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title, for supergroups, channels and group chats

fields.name: username
fields.description: Username, for private chats, supergroups and channels if available

fields.name: first_name
fields.description: First name of the other party in a private chat

fields.name: last_name
fields.description: Last name of the other party in a private chat

fields.name: is_forum
fields.description: True, if the supergroup chat is a forum (has topics enabled)

fields.name: is_direct_messages
fields.description: True, if the chat is the direct messages chat of a channel

fields.name: accent_color_id
fields.description: Identifier of the accent color for the chat name and backgrounds of the chat photo, reply header, and link preview. See accent colors for more details.

fields.name: max_reaction_count
fields.description: The maximum number of reactions that can be set on a message in the chat

fields.name: photo
fields.description: Chat photo

fields.name: active_usernames
fields.description: If non-empty, the list of all active chat usernames; for private chats, supergroups and channels

fields.name: birthdate
fields.description: For private chats, the date of birth of the user

fields.name: business_intro
fields.description: For private chats with business accounts, the intro of the business

fields.name: business_location
fields.description: For private chats with business accounts, the location of the business

fields.name: business_opening_hours
fields.description: For private chats with business accounts, the opening hours of the business

fields.name: personal_chat
fields.description: For private chats, the personal channel of the user

fields.name: parent_chat
fields.description: Information about the corresponding channel chat; for direct messages chats only

fields.name: available_reactions
fields.description: List of available reactions allowed in the chat. If omitted, then all emoji reactions are allowed.

fields.name: background_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Custom emoji identifier of the emoji chosen by the chat for the reply header and link preview background

fields.name: profile_accent_color_id
fields.description: Identifier of the accent color for the chat's profile background. See profile accent colors for more details.

fields.name: profile_background_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Custom emoji identifier of the emoji chosen by the chat for its profile background

fields.name: emoji_status_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Custom emoji identifier of the emoji status of the chat or the other party in a private chat

fields.name: emoji_status_expiration_date
fields.description: Expiration date of the emoji status of the chat or the other party in a private chat, in Unix time, if any

fields.name: bio
fields.description: Bio of the other party in a private chat

fields.name: has_private_forwards
fields.description: True, if privacy settings of the other party in the private chat allows to use tg://user?id=<user_id> links only in chats with the user

fields.name: has_restricted_voice_and_video_messages
fields.description: True, if the privacy settings of the other party restrict sending voice and video note messages in the private chat

fields.name: join_to_send_messages
fields.description: True, if users need to join the supergroup before they can send messages

fields.name: join_by_request
fields.description: True, if all users directly joining the supergroup without using an invite link need to be approved by supergroup administrators

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description, for groups, supergroups and channel chats

fields.name: invite_link
fields.description: Primary invite link, for groups, supergroups and channel chats

fields.name: pinned_message
fields.description: The most recent pinned message (by sending date)

fields.name: permissions
fields.description: Default chat member permissions, for groups and supergroups

fields.name: accepted_gift_types
fields.description: Information about types of gifts that are accepted by the chat or by the corresponding user for private chats

fields.name: can_send_paid_media
fields.description: True, if paid media messages can be sent or forwarded to the channel chat. The field is available only for channel chats.

fields.name: slow_mode_delay
fields.description: For supergroups, the minimum allowed delay between consecutive messages sent by each unprivileged user; in seconds

fields.name: unrestrict_boost_count
fields.description: For supergroups, the minimum number of boosts that a non-administrator user needs to add in order to ignore slow mode and chat permissions

fields.name: message_auto_delete_time
fields.description: The time after which all messages sent to the chat will be automatically deleted; in seconds

fields.name: has_aggressive_anti_spam_enabled
fields.description: True, if aggressive anti-spam checks are enabled in the supergroup. The field is only available to chat administrators.

fields.name: has_hidden_members
fields.description: True, if non-administrators can only get the list of bots and administrators in the chat

fields.name: has_protected_content
fields.description: True, if messages from the chat can't be forwarded to other chats

fields.name: has_visible_history
fields.description: True, if new chat members will have access to old messages; available only to chat administrators

fields.name: sticker_set_name
fields.description: For supergroups, name of the group sticker set

fields.name: can_set_sticker_set
fields.description: True, if the bot can change the group sticker set

fields.name: custom_emoji_sticker_set_name
fields.description: For supergroups, the name of the group's custom emoji sticker set. Custom emoji from this set can be used by all users and bots in the group.

fields.name: linked_chat_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the linked chat, i.e. the discussion group identifier for a channel and vice versa; for supergroups and channel chats. This identifier may be greater than 32 bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it is smaller than 52 bits, so a signed 64 bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.

fields.name: location
fields.description: For supergroups, the location to which the supergroup is connected

fields.name: rating
fields.description: For private chats, the rating of the user if any

fields.name: first_profile_audio
fields.description: For private chats, the first audio added to the profile of the user

fields.name: unique_gift_colors
fields.description: The color scheme based on a unique gift that must be used for the chat's name, message replies and link previews

fields.name: paid_message_star_count
fields.description: The number of Telegram Stars a general user has to pay to send a message to the chat
